Category: FORMULA: Weighted Score = Σ (Factor Score × Factor Weight)
The Weighted Risk Score combines 44 factors across 10 categories. Each factor is:
1. Converted from its raw value to a standardized score (1 = lowest risk, 5 = highest risk)
2. Multiplied by its assigned weight (all weights sum to 100%)
3. All weighted scores are summed to produce the final risk score
